headline: Costco quietly changes its $1.50 hot dog deal
summary: Costco has made its $1.50 hot dog and soda combo a sort of touchpoint that defines the brand's overall strategy. It's not just a meal; it's a salty, calorie-laden commitment to low prices. The chain launched the deal in 1985 and has not changed its price since then. The affordable combo has become ...

headline: Costco Makes Changes to Its Famous Hot Dog Combo. It Could Be the Start of Something Big.
